current_commit_message: Fix: Sphinx documentation, time series implementation, and comprehensive user guide

Milestone: Add C++ integration and enhanced analysis capabilities - Implement C++ statistical analyzer with scipy/numpy acceleration - Add enhanced system metrics collection with psutil optimization - Enhance network analysis with advanced correlation algorithms - Add comprehensive time series analysis and anomaly detection - Implement enhanced chart generation and reporting - Add tier management system for better storage tier handling - Update CLI with system metrics and network analysis options - Add comprehensive documentation and user guide - Update dependencies and configuration examples
